eq_dg: Lengo ambapo mutu analonda kuphiga au kufikira.

eq: be foolish, to be weak minded
eq_dg: Kukala mutu asiye na achili nyinji.

eq: chara cha index finger, first or pointing finger
eq_dg: Chala cha kpwandza cha kuonyeshera. Chala cha shahada.

Tatizo, hatari, au kukosa yakini.

eq: Sable Antelope: large black antelope found in Shimba Hills National Park
eq_dg: Aina ya nyama mkulu wa rangi nyiru anayepatikana Shimba Hills.
Tendo ra kushambuliya mutu au phatu.
Nguo nyere ya kufunikira maiti.
Mtsanga mwororo wa kuhereza.
Dada wa baba yako.
Furaha kulu ya sherehe.

eq: type of disease (especially affecting pregnant women) involving a genital discharge which is identified and treated by traditional healers
eq_sw: aina ya ugonjwa unaosumbua wanawake enye mimba
eq_dg: Ugonjwa unaogbwira achetu enye mimba, unaotambuliwa na kuphozwa ni waganga wa chizamani.
Uamuzi au ushauri unaopewa mutu.

eq: relation by marriage of same generation
eq_sw: indirect way of referring to one's wife; shemeji
eq_dg: Ndugu wa mkpwaziye au mkpwazako — dada au kaka wa mutu uriyemuhala.
Angaliya sherehe.
Mkutano wa furaha wa atu kpwa sababu ya jambo nono.
Kuhenda sherehe kpwa furaha.

eq: spirit which lives in forests or near large trees (especially baobabs)
eq_sw: they may occasionally be seen but do not possess people in
eq_dg: Pepo mbii ambayo inaishi tsakani au phephi na mihi mikulu, hasa mibuyu.

eq: be full of food, to be sated
eq_dg: Kukala umemala kurya na tumbo rikajaa.
Angaliya shuwari.
Hali ya kukala ukashiba.
Tatizo au hali ngumu ya maisha.

eq: a common greeting used by young people to elders
eq_dg: Salamu ya hishima ambayo avulana na achetu analumusa azee.
Hela ya tsi ya Kenya na Tanzania.

eq: win, to defeat, to beat someone
eq_dg: Kuphaha ushindi kpwa mchezo au malumbano.
Dzino ra nyuma ra kusagia chakurya.
Kutsukuza nyuni au nyama ili akimbire.

eq: share in, to participate, to take part in
eq_dg: Kuhenda phamwenga na atu anjina.

Chundu ya mavi ya nyama au kuku.

eq: evil spirit known especially in Tanzania
eq_dg: Pepo mbii ambayo inamanyikana hasa Tanzania.
Chundu ya mavi. Sawa na shonde.
Kutoa hewa kula tumboni kpwa njia ya nyuma na sauti.

Kumhenda mutu ahende chitu asichoronda kpwa nguvu.
